name: telegram_to_inbox
purpose: Route Telegram capture messages into safe Personal AI OS actions.
workflow: Receive Telegram text and source message id.
Ask Personal Assistant for route and action.
Record a planned event before any write.
Create high-confidence tasks through notion_task_create when execution is enabled.
Record executed or failed outcome events after task creation attempts.
Keep resource, expense, and inbox paths as draft candidates until contracts are complete.
Return a short confirmation or clarification request.
future_improvements: Add confirmation UI for ambiguous captures.
Add voice and image capture handoff.
Promote the runtime path into the Hermes Telegram gateway after VPS smoke tests.
